info.title: Cerner FHIR R4 API
info.description: Oracle Health (Cerner) FHIR R4 API providing access to electronic health records including patients, encounters, observations, conditions, medications, and more.

get.description: Returns the server's CapabilityStatement resource describing its FHIR capabilities.

tags.name: Patient Administration
